title: rosa × pulcherrima nothovar. multionoei
intro: Rosa × pulcherrima nothovar. multionoei, also known as the Multiflora Rose, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The Multiflora Rose has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its ability to stimulate digestion and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of the Multiflora Rose can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
